home.title: Dalinus Travels
home.tagline: International education and travel, all in one place.
home.heroHeading: Your Gateway to Global Education & Travel
home.heroSubheading: Discover world-class study programs, explore exciting travel destinations, and let us guide you through every step of your international journey.
home.featuresSubheading: Everything you need for your international education and travel journey, handled with care.
home.feature1Description: Access hundreds of accredited programs at top universities worldwide. Filter by field, level, budget, and intake dates.
home.feature2Description: Curated tour packages with transparent pricing, itineraries, and real-time availability for your next adventure.
home.feature3Description: Book one-on-one sessions with experienced education and visa consultants who guide you every step of the way.
home.feature4Description: Track your applications in real time, receive deadline reminders, and get notified at every status change.
home.feature5Description: Comprehensive resources on visa applications, scholarships, course selection, and pre-departure preparation.
home.feature6Description: Pay tuition deposits and tour bookings safely through our integrated payment gateway with full confirmation tracking.
home.destinationsSubheading: Explore top study and travel destinations around the world.
home.destination1Description: Home to world-renowned universities and vibrant multicultural cities.
home.destination2Description: Quality education, welcoming communities, and stunning natural landscapes.
home.destination3Description: Innovative research institutions paired with an unmatched outdoor lifestyle.
home.destination4Description: Tuition-free public universities and a thriving tech industry in the heart of Europe.
home.programsSubheading: Discover programs that match your academic goals and budget.
home.toursSubheading: Adventure awaits. Browse our handpicked travel experiences.
home.tour1Description: Explore iconic landmarks, world-class museums, and vibrant neighborhoods in the British capital.
home.tour2Description: From Banff to Jasper, experience breathtaking mountain scenery, pristine lakes, and wildlife encounters.
home.tour3Description: Sydney Opera House to the Great Barrier Reef — sun, surf, and unforgettable marine life.
home.ctaSubheading: Whether you want to study abroad or explore new destinations, we are here to make it happen.
home.guidanceSubheading: Free resources to help you navigate your international education journey.
home.guidanceScholarshipDesc: Find funding opportunities and learn how to write winning scholarship applications.
home.guidanceCourseDesc: Tips on choosing the right program that aligns with your career goals.
home.guidanceVisaDesc: Step-by-step visa guides for popular study destinations.
home.guidancePredepartureDesc: Packing lists, cultural tips, and everything you need before you travel.

destinations.heroSubtitle: Compare countries by cost of living, visa requirements, and what life is really like as an international student or traveler.
destinations.studyIntro: Each destination below lists the programs we work with, plus an overview of cost of living and visa requirements. Click through for full details.
destinations.travelIntro: Curated travel destinations with destination guides and the tour packages available for each.
destinations.ctaBody: Book a free 30-minute consultation and we'll help you shortlist destinations based on your goals and budget.

programs.heroSubtitle: Search hundreds of bachelor's, master's, PhD, and short courses at accredited institutions worldwide.
programs.resultsHelper: These are sample programs; full catalog opens once you create a free account.

tourPackages.heroSubtitle: Curated multi-day trips with transparent itineraries, inclusions, and real-time availability.

guidance.heroSubtitle: Free, practical guides written by our counselors. No login required.
guidance.scholarshipBody: Discover scholarships you can actually apply for, with eligibility, deadlines, and tips for stronger applications. We cover government scholarships (Chevening, DAAD, Fulbright), institutional grants, and country-specific options.
guidance.courseBody: How to pick a program that matches both your academic background and your career goals. Includes a self-assessment checklist and a comparison framework for shortlisted programs.
guidance.visaBody: Step-by-step visa application guides for the most popular study destinations: required documents, financial proof thresholds, common rejection reasons, and timing.
guidance.predepartureBody: Packing list, opening a local bank account, finding accommodation, getting health insurance, registering with your embassy, and adjusting to a new culture.
guidance.ctaBody: Our counselors are happy to answer your specific questions in a free consultation.

about.heroSubtitle: We help students reach the right university and travelers discover the right destination — with the same care and the same team.
about.missionBody: We started Dalinus Travels because international education and travel shouldn't require you to juggle three consultants, four spreadsheets, and a stack of unanswered emails. One platform, one team, end to end.
about.storyBody: Founded by a team of former international students and travel professionals, we've personally walked the visa appointments, the cold-call university admissions teams, and the airport queues. That's the perspective we bring to every application and every itinerary.
about.value1Body: We tell you when a program isn't a good fit, even if it costs us the sale.
about.value2Body: Application status visible in real time, deadlines tracked automatically, replies within 24 hours.
about.value3Body: We work with a small number of students per counselor so you're never just a number.
about.contactBody: Email us at hello@dalinus.travel or book a free consultation — we usually reply within one business day.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to track your applications, manage bookings, and resume where you left off.
login.errorLocked: Account is temporarily locked. Please try again in 15 minutes.
login.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Free to join. No credit card required.
register.successBody: Check your email to verify your address, then sign in.
register.errorDuplicate: This email address is already in use.
register.errorValidation: Please correct the highlighted fields and try again.
register.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.confirmation: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link has been sent.

footer.description: Your trusted partner for international education and travel experiences.
